title: Task Tracker API

goals.title: Let users capture tasks quickly
goals.description: Provide a low-friction way to create and list tasks so nothing is forgotten.
successCriteria: A task can be created and listed in under one second

goals.title: Keep task data durable
goals.description: Persist tasks so they survive restarts and are never silently lost.
successCriteria: No task is lost across a service restart

goals.title: Expose a stable HTTP contract
goals.description: Offer a predictable REST surface that clients can integrate against.
successCriteria: The public endpoints follow a documented, versioned contract

requirements.title: Create a task
requirements.description: Clients can create a task with a title and optional description.

acceptanceCriteria.then: the task is stored and returned with a generated id

requirements.title: List tasks
requirements.description: Clients can retrieve the list of existing tasks.

acceptanceCriteria.then: all tasks are returned in creation order

requirements.title: Reject invalid input
requirements.description: Malformed task payloads are rejected with a clear error.

acceptanceCriteria.given: a task payload without a title
acceptanceCriteria.then: the request is rejected with a 400 and a descriptive message

architecture: A single stateless HTTP service backed by a relational database, exposing a small REST API for tasks.
